prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 26C-BLE-WHEATFIBERKNIVES-PARENT Product Type: KITCHEN_KNIFE Brand (from catalog): Beille Existing Title: Beille Stainless Steel and Wheat Fiber Handle Kitchen Knives (Many Styles) Description: Elevate your kitchen with this five piece kitchen knife set from Beille, designed for both everyday efficiency with a nod to more eco-conscious living. Each knife in the set features high quality stainless steel blades for sharp, precise cutting and long lasting durability. Whether you're slicing crusty bread, dicing vegetables, or peeling fruit, this thoughtfully curated set includes the right tool for every kitchen task.

The set includes a classic 8 inch chef knife for all-purpose prep, a 7.75 inch serrated bread knife for clean, effortless slicing of baked goods, a 7 inch Santoku knife ideal for dicing and mincing, a 5 inch utility knife for everyday slicing, and a 3.5 inch paring knife perfect for peeling and fine detail work. With this essential stainless steel kitchen knives lineup, you'll have the flexibility to handle everything from quick snacks to full meals with confidence.

Each handle is made from sustainable wheat fiber, offering a lightweight, ergonomic grip that’s comfortable to hold and easy to control. The natural texture adds a modern, sustainable touch to your kitchen tools, while the full set maintains a clean, cohesive look. These knives are dishwasher safe, making cleanup just as easy as the prep work.

Ideal for home cooks and gift-givers alike, these knives combine modern performance with sustainable design. Whether you're prepping weekday meals or hosting weekend dinners, this set brings elegance and ease to any countertop. Balanced, sharp, and stylish, this knife set is perfect for home cooks, new homeowners, or anyone looking to refresh their kitchen essentials with durable and more sustainable kitchen tools. Search Terms: (none) Features: - 5 PIECE KNIFE SET: Includes a 3.5 inch paring knife, 5 inch utility knife, 7 inch santoku knife, 8 inch chef knife, and 7.75 inch bread knife with serrated blade; a perfectly curated knife set for slicing, chopping, mincing, and much more - WHEAT FIBER HANDLE: Crafted from a blend of sustainable wheat fiber and polypropylene, the lightweight handle offers a natural, textured grip that’s comfortable, ergonomic and better for the environment, eliminating the need for traditional plastics - STAINLESS STEEL BLADE: Built to last with a durable, corrosion resistant stainless steel blades that maintain their edges with repeated use; designed for long lasting sharpness and performance in the kitchen - STYLISH AND MODERN DESIGN: Style and sustainability meet here! Sleek, sharp and stylish, these wheat fiber and stainless steel knives adds a clean, natural look to any kitchen; balanced and easy to handle, reducing hand fatigue and improving control during tasks - DISHWASHER SAFE: Designed for convenience, all the knives in this collection are safe to clean in the dishwasher, making post meal and prep work clean up quick and hassle free === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Beille 5-Piece Stainless Steel Kitchen Knife Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: Wheat Fiber Handles, Dishwasher Safe, Chef, Santoku, Bread And Paring Knives, Sustainable

openai.title_differentiation: Stainless Steel Blades, Wheat Fiber Handles, 5 Piece Set, Dishwasher Safe, Chef Bread Santoku Paring Utility
